meaning: adj.横渡太平洋的,太平洋彼岸的
examples: We are, after all, both a transatlantic and a transpacific power.
The DoT is now requiring collusion on some transpacific, as well as transatlantic, flights.
This latest project is part of a surge in new transpacific cable construction projects, driven primarily by increasing demand in Asia.
And the price is all inclusive: excellent hotel accommodations, most meals, great guides, a fascinating and fun itinerary and all transportation including transpacific flights.
